rows.locks: Optional oversight renders stage health, blockers, diagnosis, and attribution from existing evidence only; it is read-only, optional, non-blocking, and performs no trusted writes.
The no-human real-title dogfood run uses cargo run -p ouroforge-cli -- run seeds/dogfood-deckbuilder.yaml --workers 2 and completes without observing or waiting for human input.
The with-human spot-check, override, and taste feedback path records provenance while the loop never waits and both compared runs complete.
The escape-hatch override is a non-blocking nudge provenance record only; trusted writes, source-apply, auto-apply, and block-loop regressions fail closed.
Taste/fun feedback reuses M57 curation and M58 playtest provenance, remains Ring 2, and any auto-apply or source-apply request is rejected.

Coverage v64 is test-only and preserves openchrome, verdict, journal.md, ledger.jsonl, loop-coverage attribution, evolve, source-apply, trust-gradient, no-new-engine, and no-new-data-plane boundaries.

boundary: Scenario Coverage v64 is test-only Rust regression coverage for the Era L M72 optional human channel over the existing openchrome/evidence pipeline: scenario verdicts, the four gates plus design-integrity, journal.md, ledger.jsonl, loop-coverage attribution, evolve, source-apply, and trust-gradient. It introduces no new verification engine, no new data plane, and no new persistent store. The autonomous run completes with zero human input; the optional human run records spot-check, override, and taste/fun-feedback provenance without waiting, trusted writes, source-apply authority, or auto-apply. Taste feedback is never auto-applied and fun/taste plus release go/no-go remain human Ring 2. #1 and #23 remain open.
